chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2637 - وَ سَأَلَهُ يَعْقُوبُ بْنُ شُعَيْبٍ : عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ تَلْبَسُ اَلْحُلِيَّ قَالَ «تَلْبَسُ اَلْمَسَكَ وَ اَلْخَلْخَالَيْنِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2637 - Ya'qub ibn Shu'ayb asked Imam (as) about a woman wearing jewelry while in Ihram.
Imam (as) said: "She may wear anklets (masak) and bracelets (khalkhalayn)."
